Bartolo Colon

Position: Pitcher

Bats: Right  •  Throws: Right

5-11, 285lb (180cm, 129kg)

Born: May 24, 1973 in Altamira, Dominican Republic do

High School: Puerto Plata (Puerto Plata, Dominican Republic)

Debut: April 4, 1997 (Age 23-315d, 17,024th in major league history)
   vs. ANA 5.0 IP, 6 H, 4 SO, 3 BB, 4 ER

Last Game: September 22, 2018 (Age 45-121d)
   vs. SEA 0.2 IP, 4 H, 0 SO, 0 BB, 4 ER

Rookie Status: Exceeded rookie limits during 1997 season

Agents: Wasserman

Full Name: Bartolo Colon

Nicknames: Big Bart, Big Sexy or Morales

Pronunciation: \ko-LONE\

View Player Info from the B-R Bullpen

Frequently Asked Questions

How old is Bartolo Colon?

Bartolo Colon is 52 years old.

When was Bartolo Colon born?

Bartolo Colon was born on May 24, 1973.

Where was Bartolo Colon born?

Bartolo Colon was born in Altamira, Dominican Republic.

How tall is Bartolo Colon?

Bartolo Colon is 5-11 (180 cm) tall.

How much did Bartolo Colon weigh when playing?

Bartolo Colon weighed 285 lbs (129 kg) when playing.

How many seasons did Bartolo Colon play?

Bartolo Colon played 21 seasons.

Is Bartolo Colon in the Hall of Fame?

Bartolo Colon has not been elected into the Hall of Fame.

What position did Bartolo Colon play?

Bartolo Colon was a Pitcher.

How many strikeouts did Bartolo Colon have?

Bartolo Colon had 2,535 strikeouts over his career.

How many teams has Bartolo Colon played for?

Bartolo Colon played for 11 teams; the Los Angeles Angels of Anaheim, Atlanta Braves, Boston Red Sox, Chicago White Sox, Cleveland Indians, Minnesota Twins, New York Mets, New York Yankees, Oakland Athletics, Texas Rangers and Montreal Expos.

How many World Series has Bartolo Colon won?

Bartolo Colon has never won a World Series.

When did Bartolo Colon retire?

Bartolo Colon last played in 2018.

What are Bartolo Colon's nicknames?

Big Bart, Big Sexy, Morales are nicknames for Bartolo Colon.
